videoSnippet.title: 12 Moves is Just Ridiculous for Classical || José Martínez vs Alexei Sarana || FIDE World Cup 2025
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
Photos by Michal_Walusza

Martinez Alcantara, Jose Eduardo (2644) - Sarana, Alexey (2661) 
FIDE World Cup 2025 (Chess.com) [04-02] 2025.11.12
B30 Sicilian defence

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.c3 Nf6 4.e5 Nd5 5.d4 cxd4 6.Bc4 Nb6 7.Bb3 d6 8.exd6 Qxd6 9.O-O d3 10.Na3 Bf5 11.Nb5 Qd7 12.Bf4 Rc8 13.Nxa7 Nxa7 14.Ne5 Qb5 15.Bxf7+ Kd8 16.Bb3 Ke8 17.Bf7+ Kd8 18.Bb3 Ke8 19.Bf7+ Kd8 20.Bb3 Ke8
